name: milovi-cake
description: Milovi Cake — Торты на заказ. Professional audit tooling, zero runtime deps.

scripts.audit:js: node --check js/main.js && node --check js/nav.js && node --check js/mc-2026.js && node --check js/v20-faq-fix.js && node --check js/gallery/main.js && node --check sw.js && echo '✅ All JS valid'
scripts.audit:prigorody: python3 prigorody/build.py && git diff --exit-code prigorody/*/index.html || (echo '❌ Prigorody pages stale. Run: python3 prigorody/build.py' && exit 1)
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:js && npm run audit:prigorody && npm run audit
